content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:claude/claude-opus-4-6

## Summary

Thorough review of the graceful backend degradation feature. The implementation adds BackendExhausted failure class, exhaustion pattern detection in process/openrouter/tmux backends, non-retryable retry policy, and panel degradation for completion and final_review stages (prompt_review intentionally does NOT degrade). Also includes process group kill improvements, snapshot/journal reconciliation for stale snapshots, and a transport payload unwrapping consistency fix. All 754 tests pass. Core quorum reduction formula (min_reviewers.min(panel_size - exhausted).max(1)) is correct — properly reduces effective minimum when exhaustion makes the configured minimum impossible, while always requiring at least 1 successful member. Pattern matching for exhaustion is robust with good false-positive prevention (transient rate limits, short retry-after durations, bare keywords like 'billing' are correctly excluded). No bugs, safety problems, or significant correctness gaps found.

## Amendments

None.
